scope: Mac-local read-only meta-report; no code/infra/GPU mutation; alien-grade 1-10 self-assessment + 17-ceiling census

alien_grade_metric_v1.self_defined_disclaimer: this scale is HEXA-WEAVE-internal; not externally validated

current_grade_measurement.uniformity_assumption_caveat: fractional 0.04 assumes uniform difficulty across 23 axioms; pessimistic value if Felgner = 90% of work is ~4.01

4.04_to_5.blocker: Felgner full proof complexity; mathlib4 import dependency

5_to_6.work: Zenodo deposit + arXiv preprint + peer review submission

7_to_8.work: PDB-multimer benchmark vs AF-3 + IsoDDE; >=1 metric outperformance

grade_9_10_reality_wall.verdict: NOT_REACHABLE under current actor configuration (single user + AI + Mac-local + Hetzner)

requires Nature/Science publication citing as paradigm shift
grade_10_reasons: Nobel-grade results are typically 10-30 years post-discovery
Singularity-grade requires AGI event horizon self-bootstrap
neither is within single-user actor's control
grade_9_10_reality_wall.recommendation: DO NOT plan grade 9-10; react if AlphaFold 5+ or AGI emerges

cycle_12_priority.priority_MED: cycle 50-80 grade 6 -> 7 W5 sandbox + GPU (user + compute gate)

raw_100_check.kick_infra_raw_100_status: still BREACH (cycle 11 crossed); cycle 12 fan-out 2/5 is meta-only and does not extend the kick-infra fallback chain

report_summary_korean_500char: 1) cycle 12 fan-out 2/5: HEXA-WEAVE alien-grade 1-10 metric 정의 + 17 ceiling census 완료 (cycle 11 rate-limited 보충). 2) 4-tier 척도: Tier1(1-3 foundational), Tier2(4-6 academic), Tier3(7-8 industrial), Tier4(9-10 alien). 3) 17 ceiling: 4 theoretical + 4 empirical + 4 production + 5 existential. 4) 현재 alien_grade=4.04 (4 sorry-free + 1/23 mechanical conversion). 5) 도달 path: 4.04→5 (cycle 12-30, 2-4주, mathlib4+Felgner) → 5→6 (cycle 30-50, Zenodo 사용자승인 필요) → 6→7 (cycle 50-80, W5 sandbox+GPU) → 7→8 (cycle 80-150, AF-3 outperform benchmark). 6) 현실적 천장 grade 8 (≈1-2년/cycle 150). 7) grade 9-10 NOT REACHABLE under single-user+AI 구성 (multi-lab adoption + Nobel-grade impact + AGI event horizon 필요); 외부 actor 필수. 8) cycle 12+ 우선순위: HIGH 4.04→5 (사용자 독립), HIGH 5→6 (사용자 승인 필요), MED 6→7/7→8, NONE 9-10. 9) raw 71 falsifier 5건 preregister: F-ALIEN-GRADE-INFLATION/F-MECH-23-NONUNIFORM/F-ZENODO-DEPOSIT-DEFERRED/F-GPU-PHANTOM/F-BENCHMARK-NOT-OUTPERFORM. 10) raw 91 C3 honest: 1-10 척도는 내부 self-defined; 외부 validation 없음; 4.04는 균일 난이도 가정 하 lower bound.
